mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox (id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload) VALUES (#{id}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{eventType}, #{payload})
mapper.select: SELECT id, aggregate_type AS aggregateType, aggregate_id AS aggregateId, event_type AS eventType, payload, created_at AS createdAt FROM outbox ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
